notes: Chip sell-off and AI jitters returning with S&P/Nasdaq slipping into red; VIX back up to 19.7 and Micron earnings keep semis fragile. Holding defensive at 0.40 — no chasing chip/AI knives.
journal_entry: Wednesday midday, day flat. Early tech rebound faded as chip sell-off resumed ahead of Micron reaction; VIX ticked up to 19.7. Keeping risk-off/0.40, avoiding semis and SPY; watching PCE print and whether tech can stabilize before re-risking.
